meta.title: Services | Armature Wealth Office
meta.description: A coordinated wealth operating system. Not advice in isolation ГўВЂВ” integrated governance across your entire financial life.

hero.heading: A system, not a stack of services.

intro.body1: Traditional advisory models separate your financial life into silos ГўВЂВ” investments here, tax there, estate somewhere else. Each advisor operates within their domain, correctly. What no one owns is the interaction between them.
intro.body2: Armature replaces that fragmentation with a wealth operating system ГўВЂВ” a single governing structure that holds everything in view, coordinates across domains, and reduces the number of decisions that require your direct involvement.

coreDomains.heading: Core domains of the operating system

domains.title: Investment Governance
domains.body: Portfolio construction, allocation discipline, manager selection, and ongoing rebalancing ГўВЂВ” all governed by a written investment policy, not market sentiment.

domains.title: Tax Architecture
domains.body: Cross-domain tax coordination ГўВЂВ” not just this year's return, but the structural interaction between income, gains, charitable giving, entity distributions, and estate transfers.

domains.title: Estate & Entity Structuring
domains.body: Trusts, LLCs, family entities, and ownership structures ГўВЂВ” reviewed for alignment with your current goals, not just the year they were created.

domains.title: Risk & Insurance Design
domains.body: Comprehensive risk assessment across personal liability, professional exposure, property, and key-person risk ГўВЂВ” designed to protect the whole, not just the parts.

domains.title: Cash Flow & Liquidity Architecture
domains.body: Designed income from all sources ГўВЂВ” practice, portfolio, real estate, entities ГўВЂВ” structured for tax efficiency and reduced principal oversight.

domains.title: Advisor Coordination & Oversight
domains.body: Your CPA, attorney, insurance broker, and investment managers ГўВЂВ” held accountable to one operating plan, with clear deliverables and shared context.

integration.heading: Integration is the product
integration.body1: The value of Armature is not in any single domain. It is in the integration across all of them. Every decision is made with visibility into what it affects elsewhere.
integration.body2: A Roth conversion is evaluated against this year's income, the estate plan, and the charitable giving strategy ГўВЂВ” simultaneously. A real estate acquisition is assessed for its tax impact, its liquidity effect, and its role in the portfolio ГўВЂВ” before the LOI is signed.
integration.closing: This is what a wealth operating system does. It holds the full picture so you don't have to.
